notes:
• Full citation template list (Settings ▸ Citation): long + short exhibit citation (first vs. subsequent — „Anlage K 1, Kaufvertrag vom 5. Mai 2020“ then „Anlage K 1“), evidence-offer (Beweisantritt) two-liner, award first/short — all editable, presets fill them
• Insert Evidence Offer (Beweis) — Exhibit menu, ⌥⌘B
• Manual exhibit numbering (Settings ▸ Numbering) — LitArbi never touches your numbers
• Import adopts existing numbers from filenames (Anlage K 1 / K-1 / Exhibit C-101 / Beilage 5 …), editable in a new No. column in the import review
